appStore.name: Huhu — AI Companion & Roleplay
appStore.subtitle: AI that remembers you
appStore.promotionalText: Stamina regens over time. RAG long-term memory for your story together.
appStore.description:
Huhu is an AI companion built for emotional connection and roleplay, with retrieval-augmented long-term memory so your relationship stays coherent.

• Stamina + Huhu Coins dual economy
• Lite / Basic / Premium subscriptions with regional PPP pricing
• Simple, long, and exciting chat modes
• Diary, moments, and friends
• Age 18+ confirmation without ID upload

Not medical advice. If you are in crisis, contact local professional support.

googlePlay.title: Huhu — AI Companion
googlePlay.shortDescription: AI companion with memory & fair stamina
googlePlay.fullDescription:
Huhu is an AI companion with long-term memory, relationship stages, and fair stamina recovery for everyday chats.

• Subscriptions and coin packs
• Voice and photo chat (tiered)
• Privacy controls and data deletion

Not medical advice.
